refnamediv.refpurpose: Add synthetic noise to an image.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: out = imnoise(image, type) out = imnoise(image, type, parameter1, parameter2)

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Supports Gaussian, salt-and-pepper, local-variance, speckle, and normalized Poisson-approximation noise. Output preserves the input class where supported. The local-variance form accepts either a variance image or intensity/variance lookup vectors.

tr.td: Documented in the OpenCV 5 development line.
